sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(`o`.`ordered` AS DATE) AS `order_date`, 
    SUM(`o`.`total`) AS `revenue`,
    SUM(`o`.`total` - (`oi`.`qty` * `oi`.`unit_price`)) AS `profit`
FROM 
    `mysql.store`.`orders` AS `o`
JOIN 
    `mysql.store`.`order_items` AS `oi` ON `o`.`orderid` = `oi`.`orderid`
GROUP BY 
    CAST(`o`.`ordered` AS DATE)
ORDER BY 
    `order_date` ASC
